utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey ! What did you decide to do about the movie ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is not like it is porn !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: This is a serious , legitimate movie .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And the nudity is really important to the story .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That is what you say about porn .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You are right . Maybe I should not even go on the call back .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No ! No you should ! A lot of major actors do nude scenes ! I mean , the chance to star in a movie ? Come on !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And I am only naked in one scene .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: My character catholic and he falls in love with this Jewish girl .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Who run away together and they get caught in this big rainstorm .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: So we go into this barn and undress each other and hold each other .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is really sweet and ... and tender .
